title: The Achilles’ Heel of Biden’s Climate Plan? Coal Miners.
content: Unions representing other workers affected by climate legislation have struck deals, but opposition from coal miners has persisted, complicating the path to enactment.

org_facet: American Federation of Labor-Congress of Industrial Organizations

en_title: The Achilles’ Heel of Biden’s Climate Plan? Coal Miners.
en_content: Unions representing other workers affected by climate legislation have struck deals, but opposition from coal miners has persisted, complicating the path to enactment.

title: Group Backed by Top Companies Moves to Combat A.I. Bias in Hiring
content: The organization has created a format for evaluating the technology, which is often used to screen job candidates.
en_title: Group Backed by Top Companies Moves to Combat A.I. Bias in Hiring

title: The Key to Marketing to Older People? Don’t Say ‘Old.’
content: To reach a rapidly expanding demographic, companies are changing their tone.

title: As Omicron Threat Looms, Inflation Limits Fed’s Room to Maneuver
content: The central bank has spent years guarding against economic blows. Now it is in inflation-fighting mode, even as a potential risk emerges.
en_title: As Omicron Threat Looms, Inflation Limits Fed’s Room to Maneuver
en_content: The central bank has spent years guarding against economic blows. Now it is in inflation-fighting mode, even as a potential risk emerges.

title: A New Tesla Safety Concern: Drivers Can Play Video Games in Moving Cars
content: The feature raises fresh questions about whether Tesla is compromising safety as it rushes to add new technologies.
en_title: A New Tesla Safety Concern: Drivers Can Play Video Games in Moving Cars
en_content: The feature raises fresh questions about whether Tesla is compromising safety as it rushes to add new technologies.

title: Americans’ Pandemic-Era ‘Excess Savings’ Are Dwindling for Many
content: The drop in cash reserves has vast implications for the working class and could dampen consumer spending, a large share of economic activity.
en_title: Americans’ Pandemic-Era ‘Excess Savings’ Are Dwindling for Many
en_content: The drop in cash reserves has vast implications for the working class and could dampen consumer spending, a large share of economic activity.

title: The Stock Market’s Covid Pattern: Faster Recovery From Each Panic
content: Pandemic-driven declines don’t last as long as before, and are followed by recoveries to new highs. The dip after Omicron is following a similar pattern.

more_info.byline: By Karl Russell and Mohammed Hadi

en_title: The Stock Market’s Covid Pattern: Faster Recovery From Each Panic
en_content: Pandemic-driven declines don’t last as long as before, and are followed by recoveries to new highs. The dip after Omicron is following a similar pattern.

title: Seeking Space for Solar Farms, Cities Find Room at Their Airports
content: Airports around the nation are installing solar arrays on unused land, roofs and parking garages, helping them achieve self-sufficiency while also providing power to their communities.
en_title: Seeking Space for Solar Farms, Cities Find Room at Their Airports
en_content: Airports around the nation are installing solar arrays on unused land, roofs and parking garages, helping them achieve self-sufficiency while also providing power to their communities.

title: Brooklyn Museum Gets a New President and Chief Operating Officer
content: Kimberly Panicek Trueblood will run the business side of an institution that has struggled financially and plans to refresh its building and galleries.

title: How Tech is Helping Poor People Get Government Aid
content: Even as the government expanded aid programs, many people faced barriers to using them. That problem is now being addressed with apps and streamlined websites.
en_title: How Tech is Helping Poor People Get Government Aid

title: The Better.com C.E.O. says he’s ‘deeply sorry’ for firing workers over Zoom.
content: Vishal Garg said in a letter to employees on Tuesday that he had failed to show “respect and appreciation” in the call, which has been widely criticized.

title: Safety agency says it is looking into Tesla video games that can be played while moving.
content: “We are aware of driver concerns and are discussing the feature with the manufacturer,” the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said in a statement.
en_title: Safety agency says it is looking into Tesla video games that can be played while moving.
en_content: “We are aware of driver concerns and are discussing the feature with the manufacturer,” the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said in a statement.

title: The number of people quitting jobs remained near a record in October as openings increased.
content: The Labor Department said that 4.2 million people quit their jobs in October, a decline of about 205,000 from September but still close to a record high.
en_title: The number of people quitting jobs remained near a record in October as openings increased.
en_content: The Labor Department said that 4.2 million people quit their jobs in October, a decline of about 205,000 from September but still close to a record high.

title: Japanese Billionaire Arrives at Space Station for 12-Day Tourist Trip
content: Yusaku Maezawa, the founder of the clothing retailer Zozo, will spend 12 days in orbit with a production assistant who will document his stay.
en_title: Japanese Billionaire Arrives at Space Station for 12-Day Tourist Trip
en_content: Yusaku Maezawa, the founder of the clothing retailer Zozo, will spend 12 days in orbit with a production assistant who will document his stay.

title: The head of Instagram will take the hot seat in a congressional hearing.

title: Disney hires Geoff Morrell, a BP executive, as its corporate affairs chief.
